ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_rent" TEXT /* Average rent in the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" TEXT /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transport_access" TEXT /* Level of access to public transportation */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the neighborhood (e.g., parks, schools, hospitals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supervisor_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supervisor district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "average_rent" TEXT /* Average rent in the district */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of residents in the district */,
  "crime_rate" TEXT /* Crime rate in the district */,
  "public_transport_access" TEXT /* Level of access to public transportation */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the district (e.g., parks, schools, hospitals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eviction_causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eviction cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the eviction cause */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the eviction cause */,
  "commonality" TEXT /* Frequency of this cause in eviction cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., housing officer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the eviction case */,
  "eviction_id" TEXT /* ID of the eviction case being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the eviction case was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
